arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca to Assess PSG, Milan Target Closely Before Chelsea Make Key Decision
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are shifting their focus to Ligue 1’s rising stars as they look to reshape their squad with younger, more dynamic players. Recent signings like Bradley Barcola and Desire Doue from domestic rivals reflect this change in strategy. arts.ttl: Juventus May Offer €55M-Rated PSG Target in Blockbuster Deal for Man Utd’s Rasmus Højlund
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to part ways with Randal Kolo Muani has opened the door for the club to pursue a new No. 9 to partner with Gonçalo Ramos this summer. One player on their radar is Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. arts.ttl: Former French Star Eager to See Arsenal’s William Saliba Handle This Electric PSG Attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal secured a spot in the UEFA Champions League semifinals with a 2-1 win over Real Madrid in the second leg of their quarterfinal tie, completing a convincing 5-1 aggregate victory to set up a clash with Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Draws Zlatan Ibrahimovic Comparision After PSG Advance, Arsenal Eliminates Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta could use Arsenal star in a new position to cover for Thomas Partey’s suspension vs PSG - opinion

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer major suspension blow ahead of PSG Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Arsenal will have to play without influential midfielder Thomas Partey in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final against Paris Saint-Germain later this month.
